title: Radware Agentic AI Protection
description: Radware Agentic AI Protection provides real_time visibility, behavioral detection, and continuous posture monitoring to secure autonomous AI agents, detect misuse, and control interactions across tools, platforms, and environments.

items: Enable human-in-the-loop (HITL) override thresholds on high-risk or ambiguous actions, Continuously scan loaded plugins for CVEs & privilege escalation vectors.
LLM Incident Detection & Response, Runtime guardrails & moderation; anomalous tool use
